This map shows the administrative divisions of Türkiye.
It was not developed by experts.

about-me.name: Batuhan D.
description-2: Software or website development is not my profession.
I wanted to be a software developer for a while, but it didn't work out.
After that, I was developing applications/websites simply because I enjoyed doing it.
Now I can't dedicate time to this anymore.
Maybe I can use this website as an archive from now on.
Even if I do nothing with it, it will remain as an environment that carries the traces of my past...
about-me.description-3: You may also find links to my other profiles below.
